description: Ownership and test strategy for source omitted from the headline Jest unit-coverage denominator.

declarationExclusion.strategy: Declaration-only files contain no executable runtime statements.
declarationExclusion.rationale: Type declarations are validated by typecheck rather than Istanbul coverage.

src/extension.ts.strategy: Activation, contribution registration, and command wiring run inside @vscode/test-electron and real-pair host lanes.
src/extension.ts.rationale: The entrypoint depends on the real VS Code host lifecycle and is not a meaningful Node-only unit denominator.

src/activation/activationState.ts.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects activation state without changing the established headline denominator.
src/activation/activationState.ts.rationale: This file is covered by the critical-module ratchet while the wider activation directory remains host-owned.

src/activation/mcpActivationController.t.strategy: Real server and extension-host compatibility flows exercise MCP startup, reconnect, and context propagation.
src/activation/mcpActivationController.t.rationale: The controller coordinates VS Code events and a live MCP transport boundary.

src/activation/saveCheckController.ts.strategy: Extension-host editor flows and activation tests own save-event registration and command availability.
src/activation/saveCheckController.ts.rationale: Save hooks require the VS Code workspace event loop and document lifecycle.

src/activation/studioContextController.t.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects design-block parsing and context refresh behavior.
src/activation/studioContextController.t.rationale: Host-bound context writes stay outside the headline denominator, but covered behavior cannot regress.

src/activation/workspaceContextControlle.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects debounce, disposal, and context refresh seams.
src/activation/workspaceContextControlle.rationale: The controller mixes unit-testable scheduling with VS Code host context updates.

src/cli/exportCommands.ts.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects command construction, output boundaries, and export-service orchestration.
src/cli/exportCommands.ts.rationale: The large process-boundary module is measured separately so its lower baseline cannot dilute or be hidden by the headline denominator.

src/providers/baseKiCanvasEditorProvider.strategy: Focused unit and security coverage protects webview messages, path validation, and SVG fallback boundaries.
src/providers/baseKiCanvasEditorProvider.rationale: The provider combines VS Code custom-editor lifecycle code with testable security and message seams.

src/providers/bomViewProvider.ts.strategy: Extension-host registration plus webview, accessibility, and visual fixture lanes protect the shipped BOM surface.
src/providers/bomViewProvider.ts.rationale: The provider lifecycle depends on VS Code WebviewView resolution; generated HTML behavior is tested at the surface boundary.

src/providers/diffEditorProvider.ts.strategy: Extension-host registration and visual fixture coverage protect the custom-editor boundary and rendered states.
src/providers/diffEditorProvider.ts.rationale: The provider is primarily VS Code custom-editor lifecycle glue around separately tested diff and viewer helpers.

src/providers/netlistViewProvider.ts.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects CLI failures, generated files, webview messages, and provider refresh behavior.
src/providers/netlistViewProvider.ts.rationale: The targeted ratchet measures the provider without lowering the existing global coverage gate.

src/providers/projectTreeProvider.ts.strategy: Focused Jest coverage protects discovery, grouping, diagnostics, and cross-platform path behavior.
src/providers/projectTreeProvider.ts.rationale: The provider has substantial filesystem and VS Code tree lifecycle behavior with a dedicated ratchet baseline.

src/providers/viewerHtml.ts.strategy: Focused unit, accessibility, security, and visual tests protect the large viewer template and message contract.
src/providers/viewerHtml.ts.rationale: The handwritten template is measured separately instead of being mistaken for generated or vendored code.

src/library/libraryIndexer.ts.strategy: Component search and language-model tool tests exercise the indexer through its consumers; host integration owns workspace discovery.
src/library/libraryIndexer.ts.rationale: The indexer traverses external KiCad library roots and persistent workspace state.

src/library/librarySearchProvider.ts.strategy: Extension-host command registration and component-search tests protect the consumer-facing search contract.
src/library/librarySearchProvider.ts.rationale: The provider combines VS Code webview lifecycle, index state, and external library roots.

src/tasks/kicadTaskProvider.ts.strategy: Extension-host activation and command registration validate the task provider inside the VS Code task API boundary.
src/tasks/kicadTaskProvider.ts.rationale: Task construction and execution depend on VS Code TaskProvider and ShellExecution host objects.
